HAKUREIREIMU-SEAL_POWER.title: Seal
HAKUREIREIMU-SEAL_POWER.description:
Prevent it from dealing damage.{IsMultiplayerRun:

Based on the number of players, the effectiveness of Seal is reduced to [blue]{Scaling}[/blue]%.|}
HAKUREIREIMU-INHIBIT_POWER.title: Inhibit
HAKUREIREIMU-KUJI_KOSHIN_HO_POWER.title: 9-Syllable Self-Defense
HAKUREIREIMU-KUJI_KOSHIN_HO_POWER.descri: ALL enemy attack to you will not consume [gold]Seal[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-KUJI_KOSHIN_HO_POWER.smartD: ALL enemy attack to you will not consume [gold]Seal[/gold] for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
HAKUREIREIMU-EXTRA_DRAW_POWER.title: Extra Draw
HAKUREIREIMU-EXTRA_DRAW_POWER.descriptio: Draw [gold]Additional[/gold] cards the next time you draw any card.
HAKUREIREIMU-EXTRA_DRAW_POWER.smartDescr: Draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Additional[/gold] cards the next time you draw any card.
HAKUREIREIMU-DIFFUSIVE_BOUNDARY_POWER.de: Your [gold]attacks[/gold] deal damage to ALL enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-DIFFUSIVE_BOUNDARY_POWER.sm: [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]'s [gold]attacks[/gold] deal damage to ALL enemies for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}.
HAKUREIREIMU-DIFFUSIVE_SPIRIT_CHARM_POWE: Whenever you apply a [red]debuff[/red], apply the same amount to all other enemies.
Until next [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}, whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] apply a [red]debuff[/red], apply the same amount to all other enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-RETAIN_BLOCK_POWER.title: Retain Block
HAKUREIREIMU-RETAIN_BLOCK_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, retain [gold]Block[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-RETAIN_BLOCK_POWER.smartDes: At the start of [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]'s turn, retain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-FLIGHT_POWER.title: Flight
HAKUREIREIMU-ITARUDOKORO_NO_AOYAMA_POWER: Whenever a [gold]Counter[/gold] is placed onto the battlefield, draw card.
Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] place a [gold]Counter[/gold] onto on the battlefield, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
HAKUREIREIMU-BOUNDARY_SOLIDIFICATION_POW: [gold]Counter[/gold] placed onto the battlefield will increase its counts.
[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]'s [gold]Counter[/gold] placed onto the battlefield will  have its counts increased by [blue]{Amount}[/blue].
HAKUREIREIMU-PARRY_POWER.title: Parry
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_ASUKA_I_POWER.desc: Whenever [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] deal unblocked damage, apply a random [red]debuff[/red].
HAKUREIREIMU-YIN_YANG_ASUKA_I_POWER.smar: Whenever [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] deal unblocked damage, apply a random [red]debuff[/red] [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.
HAKUREIREIMU-SEALING_FORMATION_POWER.des: At the start of your turn, apply [gold]Seal[/gold] to all enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-SEALING_FORMATION_POWER.sma: At the start of your turn, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Seal[/gold] to all enemies.
HAKUREIREIMU-PROTECTION_FEE_POWER.title: Protection Fee
HAKUREIREIMU-PROTECTION_FEE_POWER.descri: Whenever you [gold]Fatal[/gold] an enemy, gain gold.
HAKUREIREIMU-PROTECTION_FEE_POWER.smartD: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] Fatal an enemy, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] gold.
HAKUREIREIMU-RETAIN_ENERGY_POWER.title: Retain Energy
Whenever you play a card, channel a [gold]Yin-Yang Orb[/gold].
Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] plays a card, channel [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Yin-Yang Orb[/gold].
HAKUREIREIMU-UNFETTERED_FORM_POWER.title: Unfettered Form
HAKUREIREIMU-UNFETTERED_FORM_POWER.descr:
At the start of your turn, draw additional cards.
When your hand becomes full from drawing, a random card costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-UNFETTERED_FORM_POWER.smart:
At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional cards.
When your hand becomes full from drawing, a random card costs [blue]0[/blue] this turn.
HAKUREIREIMU-KANZEN_HYOI_TO_YUMO_FUIN_PO: For every {Div:diff()} [gold]Seal[/gold] on enemies, your damage increases.

For every [blue]{Div:diff()}[/blue] [gold]Seal[/gold] on enemies, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more damage.
Currently increased by [blue]{Total:diff()}[/blue].
HAKUREIREIMU-MUGEN_NO_KOSOKU_KIGAN_POWER: Whenever you place a [gold]Counter[/gold], it activates against a random enemy.
Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] places a [gold]Counter[/gold], it activates against a random enemy [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:time|times}.
HAKUREIREIMU-DOUBLE_GREAT_BOUNDARY_POWER: Whenever you play a [gold]Counter[/gold], place a copy with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] of it onto the battlefield.
Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] plays a [gold]Counter[/gold], place [blue]{Amount}[/blue] copies with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] of it onto the battlefield.
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_PHANTOM_POWER.title: Hakurei Phantom
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_PHANTOM_POWER.descr:
Cards are played an additional time.
Whenever you play a card, Exhaust it.
HAKUREIREIMU-HAKUREI_PHANTOM_POWER.smart:
Cards are played [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional times.
Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] plays a card, [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
HAKUREIREIMU-RAINBOW_DRAGON_YIN_YANG_ORB: [gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
[gold]Yin-Yang Orbs[/gold] gain [gold]Block[/gold] equal to unblocked damage dealt.
HAKUREIREIMU-BULLET_MONEY_BONUS_PACKETS_: This player's [gold]Attack[/gold] cards have their hit count [gold]Doubled[/gold].
Until the [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]'s [gold]Attack[/gold] cards have their hit count [gold]Doubled[/gold].
Due to [gold]{Applier}[/gold], Until the [blue]{Amount}[/blue] {Amount:plural:turn|turns}, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]'s [gold]Attack[/gold] cards have their hit count [gold]Doubled[/gold].
